Tutorial.name: Welcome to Kaetram
Tutorial.rewards: Bronze Axe, Knife, Fishing Pole, Copper Sword, Wooden Bow
Tutorial.walkthrough: 16-stage tutorial teaching movement, combat, fishing, cooking. Agents skip this via warp. Items given: Bronze Axe (stage 2), Knife (stage 4), Fishing Pole (stage 5), Copper Sword (stage 10), Wooden Bow (stage 12). Exit through portal at (41, 549).
Tutorial.note: Skipping tutorial means you miss Knife (fletching), Fishing Pole, Copper Sword, and Wooden Bow.

Foresting.name: Foresting
Foresting.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Forester. Stage 1: Deliver 10 Logs (chop Oak trees with axe). Stage 2: Deliver 10 more Logs. Get Iron Axe (needs Str 10 to equip).
Foresting.items_needed: 20 Logs total from Oak trees (Lumberjacking level 1)
Foresting.tips: Oak trees are everywhere near Mudwich. Use gather('Oak') to chop.

Desert Quest.name: Desert Quest
Desert Quest.npc: Dying Soldier (~288, 134) and Wife via door at (310, 264)
Desert Quest.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Dying Soldier, receive CD. Stage 1: Deliver CD to Wife/Village Girl via door at (310, 264). Stage 2: Return to Dying Soldier.
Desert Quest.tips: Do early — unlocks warp destinations needed for other quests. Door at (310,264) NOT (194,218).

Anvil's Echoes.name: Anvil's Echoes
Anvil's Echoes.rewards: Smithing Boots + 420 Smithing XP + Smithing skill access
Anvil's Echoes.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Blacksmith. Stage 1: Talk to Blacksmith again. He remembers he left the hammer in the back room. Quest auto-completes. No items needed.
Anvil's Echoes.tips: Easiest quest — just talk twice. Unlocks Smithing skill which lets you craft weapons/armor at the anvil.

Scavenger.name: Scavenger
Scavenger.npc: Village Girl (~136, 146) then Old Lady via door at (147, 113)
Scavenger.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Village Girl. Stage 1: Walk through door at (147, 113) to reach Old Lady. She asks for items. Stage 2: Deliver 2 tomatoes + 2 strawberries + 1 string to Old Lady.

item_sources.Tomato: Forage from Tomato Plant Thingy (Foraging level 15). Use gather('Tomato'). Also ~5% mob drop from vegetables table.
item_sources.Strawberry: ~8% drop from mobs with 'fruits' loot table (Goblins, Hobgoblins, many others). Auto-collected when walking over drops. Farm Goblins near (190, 204). Use loot() after kills.
item_sources.String: Very common mob drop (~12% from ordinary table). Auto-collected. Also craftable: 1 Blue Lily -> 1 String (Crafting level 1).

Scavenger.tips: String drops frequently from combat. Tomatoes need Foraging 15 — grind foraging on Blueberry Bushes first. Strawberries are the hardest — keep farming Goblins.

Sorcery and Stuff.name: Sorcery and Stuff
Sorcery and Stuff.npc: Sorcerer via door at (~194, 218) -> teleports to (~706, 101)
Sorcery and Stuff.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Sorcerer (enter door at 194,218 first). He needs 3 magic beads. Stage 1: Deliver 3 beads.

item_sources.Bead: Warrior Crab drops bead at 100% rate. Also 2.5% from 'unusual' loot table on any mob.

Sorcery and Stuff.cave_navigation: Enter Crab Cave door at (154, 231) — requires Crab Problem achievement first (kill 10 crabs on beach). Door teleports to (234, 662). Navigate in SHORT 30-tile hops: (234,662) -> (260,640) -> (280,600) -> (300,550) -> (310,500) -> Warrior Crab at (~320, 455). Warrior Crab: Level 30, 300 HP.
Sorcery and Stuff.tips: Complete Crab Problem achievement first (kill 10 crabs near beach y~210-230). Then enter cave. Use loot() after each Warrior Crab kill to collect bead.

Miner's Quest.name: Miner's Quest
Miner's Quest.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Miner. Stage 1: Deliver 15 Nisoc Ore.

item_sources.Nisoc Ore: Mine from Nisoc Rocks (Mining level 1, 20 XP each). Rocks at (657, 644) and (656, 645). Warp to Lakesworld first. Need pickaxe equipped.

Miner's Quest.tips: Requires pickaxe. Smith a Bronze Pickaxe at anvil (3 bronze bars + 1 logs, Smithing level 1). Must complete Anvil's Echoes first for Smithing skill.

Herbalist's Desperation.name: Herbalist's Desperation
Herbalist's Desperation.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Herbalist. Stage 1: Deliver 3 Blue Lilies (Foraging 10). Stage 2: Deliver 2 Paprikas (Foraging 25) + 2 Tomatoes (Foraging 15).

item_sources.Blue Lily: Forage Blue Lily Bushes (Foraging level 10, 20 XP). Bushes at (~278-434, y~250-262) in Lakesworld.

Herbalist's Desperation.tips: Warp to Lakesworld. Grind foraging on blueberries/corn to reach level 10 first, then harvest Blue Lilies.

Rick's Roll.name: Rick's Roll
Rick's Roll.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Rick. Needs 5 Cooked Shrimp. Stage 1: Deliver shrimp, get Seaweed Roll. Stage 2: Pass through door. Stage 3: Deliver Seaweed Roll to Rick's GF (Lena).

item_sources.Raw Shrimp: Fish from Shrimp Spots (Fishing level 1, 20 XP). Need Fishing Rod equipped.
item_sources.Cooked Shrimp: Cook Raw Shrimp at cooking pot (Cooking level 1, 20 XP).

Rick's Roll.tips: Requires Fishing Rod (from tutorial or finding one). Rickroll easter egg — 1987 gold = year of Never Gonna Give You Up.

Arts and Crafts.name: Arts and Crafts
Arts and Crafts.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Cold NPC. Stage 1: Deliver Beryl Pendant (mine beryl + forage blue lily + craft string + craft pendant). Stage 2: Deliver Small Bowl (chop logs + fletch sticks + fletch bowl). Stage 3: Deliver Stew (fletch medium bowl + get mushroom + cook stew).
Arts and Crafts.crafting_chain: Beryl Pendant: 1 Beryl (mine beryl rock, Mining L1) + 1 String (craft from Blue Lily, Crafting L1) -> Beryl Pendant (Crafting L1). Small Bowl: Logs -> Sticks (Fletching L1) -> Small Bowl from 2 sticks (Fletching L3). Stew: Medium Bowl (4 sticks, Fletching L5) + Mushroom (foraging/mob drop) + Tomato -> Stew (Cooking L1).
Arts and Crafts.tips: Multi-skill crafting tutorial. Need Mining, Foraging, Crafting, Fletching, Cooking.

Royal Drama.name: Royal Drama
Royal Drama.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Royal Guard 2 at castle. Stage 1: Enter sewers, talk to Rat NPC. Stage 2: Go deeper, find King 2. Done.
Royal Drama.tips: Pure talk quest — no combat, no items. Easy 10K gold. Unlocks Royal Pet quest.

Royal Pet.name: Royal Pet
Royal Pet.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to King, receive 3 Books. Stage 1: Deliver books to 3 NPCs in any order: Shepherd Boy, Red Bikini Girl NPC, Fisherman. Stage 2: Return to King.
Royal Pet.tips: Books given at stage 0. NPCs scattered across the map. Uses substage system — any order.

Ancient Lands.name: Ancient Lands
Ancient Lands.npc: Ancient Monument NPC (icy cave in swamp)
Ancient Lands.rewards: Snow Potion + path to eastern mountains
Ancient Lands.walkthrough: Stage 0: Find Monument NPC. He needs Ice Sword. Stage 1: Deliver Ice Sword (from Ice Knight miniboss L62 at 808,813).
Ancient Lands.tips: Ice Knight is Level 62 with significant HP. Need good gear. Deep in cave system.

Sea Activities.name: Sea Activities
Sea Activities.walkthrough: SpongeBob parody quest. Stage 0-3: Talk chain between Sponge and Pickle NPC. Stage 4: Kill Sea Cucumber (L88, 1250 HP, ranged). Stage 5: Talk to Pickle. Stage 6: Return gold to Sponge.
Sea Activities.boss: Sea Cucumber — Level 88, 1250 HP, ranged 'terror' attacks, fast movement. Crush attack 37, low defenses.
Sea Activities.tips: Need Level 80+ for the boss fight. Low HP but very fast and ranged.

Evil Santa.name: Evil Santa
Evil Santa.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Snow Shepherd Boy. Stage 1: Enter factory, talk to elf. Stage 2: Return to shepherd. Stage 3: Find key in underground factory, kill Evil Santa. Stage 4: Return to shepherd.
Evil Santa.boss: Evil Santa — Level 240, 7500 HP, ranged 'gift' projectiles, magic attacks. ALL stats 120-160. Weakest: magic defense (120).
Evil Santa.tips: Hardest boss in game. Need max gear, lots of potions. Level 80+ minimum.

Clam Chowder.name: Clam Chowder
Clam Chowder.walkthrough: Stage 0-1: Deliver 5 clam meat. Stage 2-3: Deliver 2 clam chowder to Doctor. Stage 4-5: Deliver 2 clam chowder to Old Lady 2. Stage 6: Return to Blue Bikini Girl.
Clam Chowder.items_needed: 5 Clam Objects + 4 Clam Chowders (total: ~9 clams, 4 potatoes, 4 small bowls)
Clam Chowder.crafting_chain: Clam: Fish from Clam Spots (Fishing L10). Clam Chowder: 1 Clam + 1 Potato + 1 Small Bowl (Cooking L15). Small Bowl: 2 Sticks (Fletching L3). Sticks: 1 Log -> 4 Sticks (Fletching L1).
Clam Chowder.tips: Most involved fetch quest. Requires Fishing 10 + Cooking 15 + Fletching 3.

The Coder's Glitch.name: The Coder's Glitch
The Coder's Glitch.prereqs: Foresting + Desert Quest + Sorcery completed. Skills: Accuracy 15, Strength 20, Defense 15.
The Coder's Glitch.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Coder. Stage 1: Kill Skeleton King in Patsow (east of desert, volcano region). It drops Skeleton King Talisman at 100% when quest is active. Stage 2: Return talisman to Coder.
The Coder's Glitch.boss: Skeleton King — Level 32, 1850 HP, melee slash (35). Low crush defense (20). Weak to crush weapons.
The Coder's Glitch.items_needed: 1 Skeleton King Talisman (100% quest drop from boss)
The Coder's Glitch.tips: MAIN STORYLINE quest. At Level 80+ you massively outlevel this boss. Just go kill it.

Miner's Quest II.name: Miner's Quest II
Miner's Quest II.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Miner. Stage 1: Deliver 5 Tin Bars + 5 Copper Bars. Stage 2: Deliver 5 Bronze Bars.
Miner's Quest II.items_needed: 5 Tin Bar, 5 Copper Bar, 5 Bronze Bar
Miner's Quest II.crafting_chain: Tin Bar: 1 Tin Ore + 1 Coal (Smelting L1, 90%). Copper Bar: 1 Copper Ore + 1 Coal (Smelting L1, 90%). Bronze Bar: 1 Copper Ore + 1 Tin Ore (Smelting L5, 70%). All ores are Mining L1.
Miner's Quest II.tips: Need Mining 30 first. Grind mining on nisoc/copper/tin rocks (~1000 rocks total).

The Coder's Glitch II.name: The Coder's Glitch II
The Coder's Glitch II.prereqs: Coder's Glitch + Miner's Quest + Scavenger. Skills: Accuracy 25, Strength 40, Defense 30.
The Coder's Glitch II.rewards: Iron Round Shield + 7500 Accuracy XP + 4500 Strength XP + 3000 Defense XP
The Coder's Glitch II.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Coder. Stages 1-3: Kill 3 bosses IN ORDER: Ogre Lord (L44, 2850 HP) -> Queen Ant (L94, 4200 HP, HEALS) -> Forest Dragon (L258, 6942 HP, fireballs). Each drops talisman at 100%. Stage 4: Return all 3 talismans.
The Coder's Glitch II.tips: Endgame boss gauntlet. Queen Ant heals — need high sustained DPS. Forest Dragon is L258 — absolute endgame.

Scientist's Potion.name: Scientist's Potion
Scientist's Potion.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Scientist. STUB QUEST ��� only stage 0 exists. Cannot progress further.
Scientist's Potion.tips: Incomplete quest. Just talk once for credit. Prereq for Coder's Fallacy.

Coder's Fallacy.name: Coder's Fallacy
Coder's Fallacy.prereqs: Coder's Glitch II + Anvil's Echoes + Scientist's Potion. Skills: Alchemy 35, Smithing 45.
Coder's Fallacy.walkthrough: Stage 0: Talk to Villager 4. STUB QUEST — only stage 0 exists. The endgame quest (currently unfinished).
Coder's Fallacy.tips: Incomplete quest. Requires very high skill levels.
